name: FreshRSS
description: A free, self-hostable aggregator for rss feeds
compose:
name: slashnode-freshrss
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/freshrss:1.29.1
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3432:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-freshrss_server_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (freshrss). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://freshrss.org/.
